headline: MediaTek eyes Google TPU and Musk AI rack deals in system-level pivot - Kuo
summary: "My latest industry checks indicate that MediaTek has upgraded the strategic positioning of its AI business from 'IC / ASIC design' to 'system-level design,' initially targeting the PCBA (L6) for Google's TPU and the L10 rack for Elon Musk-affiliated companies' in-house AI chips," Kuo wrote. The analyst frames the move as a calculated long-term repositioning rather than a near-term earnings catalyst, noting that it carries "immaterial impact on fundamentals over the next two years."

raw.headline: MediaTek eyes Google TPU and Musk AI rack deals in system-level pivot - Kuo

The analyst frames the move as a calculated long-term repositioning rather than a near-term earnings catalyst, noting that it carries "immaterial impact on fundamentals over the next two years."

headline: What Is The Market Really Expecting From PLTR Stock?
summary: At $127.99, Palantir Technologies (PLTR) is being priced to deliver 33.3% revenue growth annually for the next 7 years simply to defend today's 134.3x multiple. That sits below the 67.7% the business is currently growing at, which is the unusual part. The multiple has already priced in a slowdown that has not yet appeared.

headline: Musk’s SpaceX $1 Trillion Revenue Goal

headline: Anthropic Block Marks US Reversal, Warning to Silicon Valley
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The extraordinary move by the US to bar foreign access to Anthropic PBC’s best AI models underscores the Trump administration’s newfound willingness to exert control over a pivotal industry. It also reminds Silicon Valley that it’s working with an imperfectly understood technology with uncertain impact.Most Read from BloombergIran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Confirms Deal Reached With USIran Signals No Deal Will Be Signed by Trump’s Sunday TimelineUS and Iran Agree to Halt War, Rest

headline: UK declares under-16 social media ban to protect children, but experts warn of enforcement challenges

headline: Trump Threatens 100% Tariffs On French Wine Unless Macron Drops Tax On Amazon, Apple, Meta And Others

headline: The S&P 500's Missing Giant: What Happens If The 6th-Largest Stock Stays Out A Full Year?
summary: SpaceX becomes the 6th largest global stock, but it will not join the S&P 500 until at least June 2027. Learn more about the market here.

headline: Technology Leads Insurance Education: Big Jump SEO Partners with Three Major Insurance Platforms to Enhance VHIS Information Quality with Latest Gemini AI Technology
summary: Leading digital marketing and search engine optimization (SEO) expert Big Jump SEO Solutions today announced a strategic partnership with three renowned local insurance education platforms: VHIS101, HKVHIS and MoneyHK101. headline: Trump Admin's Move To Curb Use Of Powerful Anthropic AI Models By Non-US Citizens Gets EU Response: 'Should Not Be Discriminatory Against Partners'
